subcodes.first_line: In all circumstances doth the True One, glorified and exalted be He, make mention of His loved ones, and continueth so to do. This is among His greatest bounties [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: در جمیع احیان حق جل و عز احبای خود را ذکر نموده و مینماید این از فضلهای بزرگ
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @praise and encouragement, @Word of God and human limitations, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
